message:
perf: use --root-only for patrol wisps to cut Dolt churn

Each patrol cycle was spawning ~10 child step wisps in Dolt, one per
formula step. Agents read steps inline from the formula and don't need
the children materialized. With --root-only, only the root wisp is
created — cutting wisp volume by ~10x per cycle across all rigs.

Stale root-only patrols (agent dies without closing) are handled by the
wisp reaper's max_age=1h, same as before.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
